host_override_note: GenBank nuccore record shows /host="Pipistrellus abramus" while NCBI Datasets summary returns the broader host label Chiroptera.
GenBank nuccore record shows /host="Tylonycteris pachypus" while NCBI Datasets summary returns the broader host label Chiroptera.
